objective: Re-reviewed the revised T04 plan for curating grove-core's public API, docs, and standalone library smoke crate after a prior revision-required verdict.
key_changes: Prior item 1 RESOLVED: plan sets GROVE_REGISTRY to repo-root registry/, bypassing non-existent dev_root() fallback.
Prior item 2 RESOLVED: GROVE_REGISTRY makes ops::symbols grammar resolution reproducible, independent of user cache.
Rust grammar verified on disk: registry/rust/grammar.wasm + tags.scm + manifest.json exist.
All re-export targets verified pub: Symbol, Defect (engine); CallSite, MapEntry, FileMap, SourceResult (ops); provision_project (init).
All internal helpers (Loaded, CapturedQuery, Index, Sources, Spec, Catalog) confirmed private — won't be leaked.
provision_project(dry_run=true) returns Ok(Vec::new()) before any grammar/fetch — no WASM needed.
core/Cargo.toml has no clap dependency — AC4 achievable.
CLI imports registry/fetch/ingest directly — keeping pub mod declarations is necessary and non-breaking.
GROVE_REGISTRY short-circuits registry_root() before search_path() cascade — verified in source.
Advisory: plan's registry precedence prose omits .grove/grammars step (immaterial).
Advisory: GROVE_REGISTRY path from smoke crate to repo registry/ is 6 levels up; exact path must be in PROGRESS.
Empty [workspace] table detachment is valid; smoke crate excluded from published workspace.
